name: AnalysisPartPositionProperties
summary: The AnalysisPartPositionProperties class contains information related to analysis part position properties.

constructors.name: AnalysisPartPositionProperties
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the AnalysisPartPositionProperties class

properties.name: AxisCoordinateX
properties.summary: The axis coordinate in the X direction.

properties.name: AxisCoordinateY
properties.summary: The axis coordinate in the Y direction.

properties.name: AxisCoordinateZ
properties.summary: The axis coordinate in the Z direction.

properties.name: AxisLocation
properties.summary: The axis location of the analysis part.

properties.name: AxisModifierX
properties.summary: The axis modifier in the X direction.

properties.name: AxisModifierY
properties.summary: The axis modifier in the Y direction.

properties.name: AxisModifierZ
properties.summary: The axis modifier in the Z direction.

properties.name: AxisOffset
properties.summary: The axis offset of the analysis part (in the global coordinate system).

properties.name: KeepAxis
properties.summary: The keep axis setting of the analysis part.
